title: How people sign in
question: When we add accounts, how should people sign in?
rationale: Still open — we're weighing how much friction is worth it. No option chosen yet; this is what an undecided decision looks like in the log.

tradeoffs.note: nothing to remember; click a link in their inbox
we have to send and check emails
passwords, resets, and keeping them safe
can stay signed in after the first time

options.label: Sign in with Google or Apple

tradeoffs.note: one tap with an account they already have
wiring up each provider, but they handle the hard parts
